description_long: This is a modern bungalow set within a spacious, landscaped yard featuring a central white single-story house surrounded by green lawn. The property includes a rectangular swimming pool, a tennis court, a small garden area, and several paved walkways connecting the amenities. The main building has a flat roof, large windows, and a covered entryway with decorative shrubs. Outdoor features such as a hot tub, patio seating, and a small utility shed are visible. The layout is open and organized, with clear zones for recreation, relaxation, and utility. The overall design emphasizes comfort, leisure, and contemporary aesthetics.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, surrounded by a large green yard, pool, tennis court, and landscaped features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, decorative shrubs, and a broad lawn with visible walkways.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the swimming pool, hot tub, and utility shed, with the tennis court in the background.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade of the bungalow, the pool, tennis court, and garden area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, garden, and utility areas, with the house and porch partially visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on multiple facades
